personalInfo.name: M Tanusree Reddy
personalInfo.title: AI & Data Science Engineer | Full-Stack Developer
personalInfo.tagline: Aspiring Software Engineer building scalable AI-driven and full-stack solutions.

about.heading: About Me
text: Hi! I'm M Tanusree Reddy, an Artificial Intelligence & Data Science student with a strong interest in AI, Machine Learning, and Full-Stack Development. I enjoy building projects that solve real-world problems and help me improve my technical skills.

I have experience working with Python, JavaScript, React, FastAPI, SQL, and Machine Learning, and I love learning new technologies through hands-on projects. I'm always looking for opportunities to grow, collaborate, and contribute to meaningful software and AI solutions.

skills.heading: My Skills
skills.subheading: Technologies I use to build scalable and intelligent solutions.

items.title: Credinity AI | AI-Powered Credit Risk Prediction Platform
items.description: Built an end-to-end credit risk prediction platform with FastAPI, React, and Scikit-learn for real-time and batch predictions. Developed and optimized Random Forest and XGBoost models using feature engineering and model evaluation metrics (ROC-AUC, Precision, Recall, F1-score). Integrated SHAP Explainable AI to generate transparent prediction insights and improve model interpretability.

items.title: Pipeline Failure Detection | AI-Powered CI/CD Debugging Assistant
items.description: Developed an AI-powered system to detect and analyze GitHub Actions pipeline failures by parsing CI/CD logs and identifying root causes. Integrated GitHub Actions API and Gemini API to retrieve workflow logs, summarize failures, and generate actionable debugging recommendations. Built a modular backend using FastAPI and Pydantic for log processing, error classification, and automated failure analysis.

items.title: SQL Genie | AI-Powered Natural Language to SQL Generator
items.description: Built an AI-powered application that converts natural language queries into optimized SQL using the Gemini API and database schema context. Developed a FastAPI backend with schema-aware prompt engineering, query validation, and SQL generation for accurate database interactions. Designed a responsive React + TypeScript frontend with query history, syntax highlighting, and seamless API integration for an intuitive user experience.

items.title: AI-Powered Recruitment Portal
items.description: Built recruiter dashboard handling 500+ candidates with resume parsing & match scoring (0–100%), skill gap detection, and automated JD generation.

items.title: Video Analysis Platform
items.description: Real-time object detection using YOLOv8 with frame optimization for reduced latency and REST API integration.

items.title: Jewellery E-commerce Website
items.description: Full-stack platform with authentication and a collaborative filtering recommendation engine. Features a responsive Tailwind UI.
Analyzed 7.7K+ Netflix records and built an Airbnb price prediction model using Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn.

items.company: AICTE – Shell India Markets – Edunet Foundation
items.description: Built a real-time traffic monitoring system and implemented SORT multi-object tracking using OpenCV & YOLOv8.
